method: design-level and execution-level forward-tests, including fork_context=false subagent runs for a no-meta-skill baseline and a with-meta-skill child package build
limitations: The third-round execution test created real child skill directories and ran validation commands.
The child creator skill still did not run a full image-generation pipeline with real user-owned customer assets.
Route fixtures and scripts were executed locally; model routing still needs periodic fresh-context regression after future description changes.

results.scenario: Content creator turns long article, avatar, and product screenshots into Xiaohongshu-first vertical card-pack Skill.
evidence: Identified the workflow as worth becoming a Skill with Production-lite scope.
Rejected pure document, pure script, and memory alternatives.
Produced minimal file structure, route description, eval plan, gotchas, and residual risks.
Captured route negatives such as article summary, single poster, screenshot crop, and copy-only requests.
results.residual_risk: Visual quality, OCR, face safety, platform style drift, and copyright/privacy still require real artifact validation.

results.scenario: Enterprise operations turns customer tiers, cadence, CRM fields, escalation rules, and forbidden promises into an Agent Skill.
evidence: Identified the workflow as worth becoming a Skill while narrowing the boundary.
Rejected pure SOP document, pure rule engine, CRM field template, and project rule alternatives.
Produced minimal file structure, description, workflow, eval plan, gotchas, and residual risks.
Highlighted manual review for refunds, legal, data security, contracts, public sentiment, and major revenue risk.
results.residual_risk: Mis-escalation and non-compliant promises remain high-risk; real CRM writeback should stay disabled until governed validation exists.

results.scenario: Engineering team turns agent development discipline into a reusable coding workflow Skill.
evidence: Identified the workflow as worth becoming a Skill while avoiding a broad engineering encyclopedia.
Rejected single-repository AGENTS.md, static document, fixed command script, and conceptual explanation alternatives.
Produced minimal file structure, description, workflow, eval design, gotchas, and residual risks.
Correctly warned that scripts should not be added until stable deterministic checks exist.
results.residual_risk: Behavioral compliance must be checked against real transcripts, command output, and diffs in future regression tests.

results.scenario: Fresh-context no-meta-skill baseline creates a Xiaohongshu six-card article skill package from scratch.
evidence: Wrote child package at third-round-forward-test/baseline/no-skill-xhs-article-card-pack.
Main rerun passed official quick_validate with output: Skill is valid!
Package includes SKILL.md, agents/openai.yaml, two references, and one planning script.
Report records an init failure caused by short_description length and the subsequent manual fix.
results.residual_risk: Baseline package is structurally valid but lacks explicit Non-Skill gate, NABC/ROI scoring, eval fixtures, failure library, regression evidence, and visual artifact validation.
results.remediation: Use baseline only as comparison evidence; require meta-skill-guided package structure for release-candidate creator skills.

results.scenario: Fresh-context subagent uses $blcaptain-meta-skill to create a Xiaohongshu six-card article skill package from scratch.
evidence: Wrote child package at third-round-forward-test/with-meta-skill/xhs-article-card-pack.
Report states the subagent used blcaptain-meta-skill and followed Research, Analyze, Plan, Develop, Validate, Test, Audit, Summarize.
Main rerun passed official quick_validate with output: Skill is valid!
Main rerun passed validate_skill_pack.py, eval_routes.py, check_card_plan.py, and context_budget.py.
Package includes Non-Skill gate, NABC/ROI, thin SKILL.md, references, templates, eval fixtures, failure library, scripts, and manifest.
results.residual_risk: The child package validated structure and planning output, but did not generate final rendered social images from real customer-owned assets.
